name: Alse

sheet.name: Alse
sheet.background_story:
A young witch, burned by the church of Agora for casting her first and only spell. The Eunuchs first humiliated her sealing her head in a mask to blind and make her deaf.

Three days she was left to wonder about the world in the mask while her flesh remained intact.

Now she exists forever, a husk with no senses.
